ground_truth.title: Hire Cyber Security Experts | Cyber Security Staffing
ground_truth.main_content:
Hunter Recruiting helps companies hire cybersecurity professionals for permanent or temporary roles who can protect critical assets, strengthen security postures, and mitigate cyber threats. Their cybersecurity staffing services connect clients with highly qualified professionals who match the specific technical requirements of each role. With over 20 years of experience in technology staffing and an extensive network, they fill the most critical cybersecurity positions.

The cyber security staffing process is rigorous, utilizing outside assessments as well as identity verification tools to avoid risk and make cyber security placements that last. This vetting process, backed by industry insight and a diverse candidate network, ensures every candidate placed is ready to make a difference on day one. When clients get started, they are paired with a dedicated recruiter who gets to know their organization and role, then starts finding talent.

They place various types of cyber security professionals including Cyber Security Engineers, Security Engineers, SOC Analysts, DevSecOps Engineers, Penetration Testers, IAM Engineers, and Security Architects. Each specialization requires candidates who understand different disciplines from technical security and compliance to physical security and emerging security technologies.

The benefits of using their cyber security staffing services include access to over 1.2 million candidates with 70% being passive candidates not found on job boards, shorter time to hire with expert recruiters involved, higher retention rates with only 2% placement turnover compared to the national average of 25%, flexible hiring options for permanent and temporary roles, and cost-effectiveness through guaranteed high-performing talent.

Hunter Advantage statistics show 100% of tech candidates go through their two-step quality screening process for technical skills, 41 days average time to fill from job posting to placement, and 96% of technology placements remain with their employer for 3+ years.
with: Hunter Recruiting helps companies hire cybersecurity professionals for permanent or temporary roles who can help them protect critical assets, strengthen security postures, and mitigate cyber threats.
Our cybersecurity staffing services connect you with highly qualified professionals who match the specific technical requirements of your role.

Our cyber security staffing process is rigorous, utilizing outside assessments as well as identity verification tools to avoid risk and make cyber security placements that last.
Instantly tap into our 1.2 million–strong talent pool, including 70% passive candidates you won't find on job boards.
